creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
Netscape Communicator 4.73 for BSD/OS, similar to the
netscape47-communicator and linux-netscape47-communicator ports but not
needing a.out libraries or Linux compatibility

The changes to the netscape4-communicator port which this needs have
already been committed by Kenji Sada.

How-To-Repeat: N/A
